/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libabsl_flags_marshalling.so.2407.0.0 -o libabsl_flags_marshalling.so.2407.0.0 CMakeFiles/flags_marshalling.dir/marshalling.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../types:\$ORIGIN/../strings:\$ORIGIN/../numeric:\$ORIGIN/../base:" ../types/libabsl_bad_optional_access.so.2407.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_str_format_internal.so.2407.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_strings.so.2407.0.0 ../numeric/libabsl_int128.so.2407.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_strings_internal.so.2407.0.0 ../strings/libabsl_string_view.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_base.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.2407.0.0 -lpthread ../base/libabsl_throw_delegate.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_log_severity.so.2407.0.0
